name: Grettel
description: Ten rounds of three clean and jerks and three burpees over the bar — a short-interval couplet that repeats a small barbell and bodyweight pairing many times rather than escalating volume.
source_notes: crossfit.com/faq/wod (official CrossFit FAQ, 'Explain The Workouts with Names (the Girls)?'), retrieved 2026-07-08
